hero_headline:
Quiet luxury,
built to outlast generations.
hero_subtext: Aurèle operates in strict exclusivity with historic European master workshops—redefining contemporary heirloom clothing through meticulously sourced natural fibers and generational craftsmanship.
atelier_heading: Sculpted through time, untethered by trends.
atelier_paragraph: Every dynamic curve and precision baseline is generated fully in-house, balancing centuries-old drafting discipline with refined modern architectural lines.
private_paragraph: Schedule a private digital presentation or an intimate suite fitting with our chief pattern cutter.
footer_tagline: Aurèle Design House, Paris – Milan – Tokyo. All rights reserved.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Aurèle International S.A. Crafted with absolute devotion.
